title: Self-evolving AI, robot fights, new GPT voice, new local image model, Gemma upgrade: AI NEWS
summary: A YouTube video summarizing major AI releases and updates including HiDream-O1 Image for image generation, Gemma 4 with multi-token prediction, PhysForge for physics simulation, GPT Realtime 2 for voice, and AlphaEvolve for self-optimizing systems. The episode covers 20+ AI tools, models, and research projects spanning vision, language, robotics, and multimodal domains.
